reference: I am in remission now from uterine cancer. I was diagnosed a year ago and had a total hysterectomy. I had twenty-five treatments of radiation and finished in July. I am also in remission from breast cancer, both at stage two. I am having clear, jelly-like discharge from my rectum and pain in my abdomen and lower pelvic area. I also have cramping. What is the jelly from? I am having diarrhea also.
text: I am in remission now from uterine cancer. I was diagnosed a year ago and had a total hysterectomy. I had 25 treatments of radiation and finished in July. I am also in remission from breast cancer, both at stage two. I am having clear jelly-like discharge from my rectum and pain in my abdomen and lower pelvic area. I also have cramping. What is the jelly from? I am having diarrhea also.
